query:
UPDATE articles 
            SET 
                title = COALESCE($3, title),
                slug = COALESCE($4, slug), -- Обновляем slug, если он пришел
                description = COALESCE($5, description),
                body = COALESCE($6, body),
                updated_at = NOW()
            WHERE slug = $1 AND author_id = $2
            RETURNING id, slug
